Petitioner James River Insurance Company'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One From Respondent Askalu Iyasu
Off Calendar Aug-04-2022 Continued To Aug-18-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jamal Atiba, Esq. (415.397.9006; jatiba@eghblaw.com) of Edlin Gallagher Huie + Blum for Petitioner.
Josh Yagoubzadeh, Esq. (310.400.5915) of Yagoubzadeh Law Firm LLP for Respondent.

Counsel do not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER JAMES RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Judicial Council Form Interrogatories, Set One From Respondent Askalu Iyasu:

The matter is continued to August 18, 2022 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.
Judge Pro Tem to prepare report and recommendation.

In addition, the court sets a continuance hearing for August 10, 2022 at 9:00am, Discovery Department for a status update on parties meet and confer efforts on an agreement/resolution.
